business_goal: Allow customers to purchase products from the online store
user_actions: Click 'Add to Cart' for a product
Enter valid First Name, Last Name, and Postal Code
expected_outcomes: The Products page should be displayed
The list of available products should be displayed
The cart badge should increase by 1
The checkout information page should be displayed
The checkout overview page should be displayed
The order confirmation page should be displayed
The login page should be displayed
validations: An error message should be displayed when invalid credentials are entered
A validation message should be displayed when any mandatory field is left empty
